## Issues

Closes #74

## Summary

Adds a dedicated Squarespace integration runbook for the wine list embed workflow, including setup prerequisites, copy-paste embed snippets, security header guidance, scheduler configuration, and troubleshooting.

## Changes

- Added a new runbook at `docs/squarespace-integration.md` covering:
	- HTTPS/backend prerequisites
	- required embed/API routes (`/embed/wine-list`, `/api/wines/grouped`)
	- Squarespace iframe and loader-script embed options
	- security/header strategy for iframe embedding (Helmet/frameguard/CSP considerations)
	- production scheduler env settings (`SQUARE_SYNC_ENABLED`, `SQUARE_SYNC_CRON`)
	- post-launch validation and troubleshooting scenarios
- Added a README pointer to the new runbook.

- [x] `npm run build`
- [x] `npm run test`
- [x] `npm run test:coverage`
- [x] `npx prisma validate`
- [x] Relevant endpoint checks completed
